enclosing_signature: (X : ő© ‚Üí őĪ) (Y : ő© ‚Üí ő≤) (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) [finY : FiniteRange Y] (őľ : Measure ő©) [IsProbabilityMeasure őľ] : ‚ąÉ (ő©' : Type u) (_ : MeasurableSpace ő©') (X‚āĀ X‚āā : ő©' ‚Üí őĪ) (Y' : ő©' ‚Üí ő≤) (őĹ : Measure ő©'), IsProbabilityMeasure őĹ ‚ąß Measurable X‚āĀ ‚ąß Measurable X‚āā ‚ąß Measurable Y' ‚ąß CondIndepFun X‚āĀ X‚āā Y' őĹ ‚ąß IdentDistrib (‚ü®X‚āĀ, Y'‚ü©) (‚ü®X, Y‚ü©) őĹ őľ ‚ąß IdentDistrib (‚ü®X‚āā, Y'‚ü©) (‚ü®X, Y‚ü©) őĹ őľ
goal_text: ‚äĘ IdentDistrib (‚ü®fun ŌČ => ŌČ.1.2, fun ŌČ => ŌČ.2‚ü©) (‚ü®X, Y‚ü©) őĹ (‚ąĎ x ‚ąą FiniteRange.toFinset Y, őľ (Y ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {x}) ‚ÄĘ őľ[|Y ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {x}])

m : ő≤ ‚Üí Measure ((őĪ √ó őĪ) √ó ő≤) := fun y => ((m' y).prod (m' y)).prod (dirac y)
őĹ : Measure ((őĪ √ó őĪ) √ó ő≤) := ‚ąĎ y ‚ąą FiniteRange.toFinset Y, őľ (Y ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {y}) ‚ÄĘ m y
h3' : ‚ąÄ (y : ő≤), {ŌČ | Y ŌČ = y} ‚ąą ae őľ[|Y ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {y}]
h3 : ‚ąÄ (y : ő≤), IdentDistrib (fun ŌČ => (X ŌČ, y)) (‚ü®X, Y‚ü©) őľ[|Y ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {y}] őľ[|Y ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {y}]
h4 : ‚ąÄ (y : ő≤), {ŌČ | ŌČ.2 = y} ‚ąą ae (m y)
h1 : map Prod.snd őĹ = map Y őľ
prior_tactics:
refine ‚ü®(őĪ √ó őĪ) √ó ő≤, by infer_instance, fun ŌČ ‚Ü¶ ŌČ.1.1, fun ŌČ ‚Ü¶ ŌČ.1.2, fun ŌČ ‚Ü¶ ŌČ.2, őĹ, ?_,
  measurable_fst.comp measurable_fst, measurable_snd.comp measurable_fst,
  measurable_snd, ?_, ?_, ?_‚ü©

¬∑ constructor
  simp only [coe_finset_sum, smul_toOuterMeasure, OuterMeasure.coe_smul, Finset.sum_apply,
    Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul, őĹ]
  have : ‚ąĎ y ‚ąą finY.toFinset, őľ (Y ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {y}) * 1 = 1 := by
    simp only [mul_one]
    rw [sum_measure_preimage_singleton]
    ¬∑ rw [‚Üź FiniteRange.range Y, preimage_range, measure_univ]
    ¬∑ exact fun y _ ‚Ü¶ hY <| .singleton y
  rw [‚Üź this]
  congr with y
  rcases eq_or_ne (őľ (Y ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {y})) 0 with hy | hy
  ¬∑ simp [hy]
  have : IsProbabilityMeasure (m' y) := h5 hy
  simp

¬∑ rw [condIndepFun_iff, ae_iff_of_countable]
  intro y hy
  have hy' : őĹ (Prod.snd‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {y}) = őľ (Y ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {y}) := by
    rw [‚Üź map_apply measurable_snd (by simp), ‚Üź map_apply hY $ .singleton y, h1]
  rw [h1] at hy
  have hy'' : őľ (Y ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {y}) ‚Č† 0 := by
    convert hy
    exact (map_apply hY .of_discrete).symm
  have h2 : őĹ[| Prod.snd‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {y}] = m y := by
    rw [Measure.ext_iff]
    intro E _
    rw [cond_apply (measurable_snd (by simp)), hy']
    have h3 : (m y) ((Prod.snd‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {y}) ‚ą© E) = (m y) E := by
      apply measure_congr
      apply inter_ae_eq_right_of_ae_eq_univ
      simp only [ae_eq_univ]
      rw [(show (Prod.snd‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {y})Š∂ú = Prod.snd‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' ({y}Š∂ú) by rfl), ‚Üź map_apply measurable_snd (by simp)]
      simp [m]
    have h3' {x : ő≤} (hx : x ‚Č† y) : (m x) ((Prod.snd‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {y}) ‚ą© E) = 0 := by
      apply measure_inter_null_of_null_left E
      rw [‚Üź Measure.map_apply measurable_snd (by simp), MeasureTheory.Measure.map_snd_prod]
      simp only [smul_apply, MeasurableSet.singleton, dirac_apply', smul_eq_mul, mul_eq_zero,
        indicator_apply_eq_zero, Pi.one_apply,
        one_ne_zero, imp_false]; right; exact hx
    simp only [coe_finset_sum, coe_smul, Finset.sum_apply, Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul, őĹ]
    rw [Finset.sum_eq_single_of_mem y ?_]
    ¬∑ rw [h3, ‚Üź mul_assoc, ENNReal.inv_mul_cancel hy'', one_mul]
      finiteness
    ¬∑ intro _ _ hx
      rw [h3' hx]
      simp
    ¬∑ convert FiniteRange.range Y ‚Ėł Set.preimage_singleton_nonempty.mp (nonempty_of_measure_ne_zero hy'')
  rw [h2, indepFun_iff_map_prod_eq_prod_map_map]
  ¬∑ let f : (őĪ √ó őĪ) √ó ő≤ ‚Üí őĪ √ó őĪ := Prod.fst
    show ((m y).map f) = ((m y).map (Prod.fst ‚ąė f)).prod ((m y).map (Prod.snd ‚ąė f))
    have : IsProbabilityMeasure (m' y) := h5 hy''
    have : (m y).map f = (m' y).prod (m' y) := by simp [f, m]
    rw [‚Üź map_map measurable_fst measurable_fst, ‚Üź map_map measurable_snd measurable_fst, this]
    simp
  ¬∑ exact (measurable_fst.comp measurable_fst).aemeasurable
  exact (measurable_snd.comp measurable_fst).aemeasurable

¬∑ rw [‚Üź sum_meas_smul_cond_fiber' hY őľ]
  refine identDistrib_of_sum _ ((measurable_fst.comp measurable_fst).prodMk measurable_snd) (hX.prodMk hY) ?_
  intro y hy
  have h1 : IdentDistrib (fun ŌČ ‚Ü¶ (ŌČ.1.1, ŌČ.2)) (fun ŌČ ‚Ü¶ (ŌČ.1.1, y)) (m y) (m y) := by
    apply IdentDistrib.of_ae_eq ((measurable_fst.comp measurable_fst).prodMk measurable_snd).aemeasurable
    apply Filter.eventuallyEq_of_mem (h4 y)
    intro _; simp
  have h2 : IdentDistrib (fun ŌČ ‚Ü¶ (ŌČ.1.1, y)) (fun ŌČ ‚Ü¶ (X ŌČ, y)) (m y) (őľ[|Y ‚Üź y]) := by
    apply IdentDistrib.comp _ measurable_prodMk_right
    apply (identDistrib_comp_fst measurable_fst _ _).trans
    have : IsProbabilityMeasure ((őľ[|Y ‚Üź y]).map X) := h5 hy
    apply (identDistrib_comp_fst measurable_id _ _).trans

enclosing_signature: {m : ‚Ąē} {ő© : Fin m ‚Üí Type*} (hő© : ‚ąÄ i, MeasureSpace (ő© i)) (hő©prob : ‚ąÄ i, IsProbabilityMeasure (hő© i).volume) (X : ‚ąÄ i, ő© i ‚Üí G) (ŌÜ : Equiv.Perm (Fin m)) : D[fun i ‚Ü¶ X (ŌÜ i); fun i ‚Ü¶ hő© (ŌÜ i)] = D[X ; hő©]
goal_text: ‚äĘ H[fun x => ‚ąĎ i, x i ; Measure.pi fun i => Measure.map (X (ŌÜ i)) ‚Ąô] = H[fun x => ‚ąĎ i, x i ; Measure.pi fun i => Measure.map (X i) ‚Ąô]
hypotheses: X : (i : Fin m) ‚Üí ő© i ‚Üí G
raw_tactic_line:
¬∑ apply IdentDistrib.entropy_congr
  exact {
    aemeasurable_fst := by
      apply Measurable.aemeasurable
      apply Finset.measurable_sum
      intro i _
      exact measurable_pi_apply i
    aemeasurable_snd := by
      apply Measurable.aemeasurable
      apply Finset.measurable_sum
      intro i _
      exact measurable_pi_apply i
    map_eq := by
      let sum := fun x : Fin m ‚Üí G ‚Ü¶ ‚ąĎ i, x i
      let perm := MeasurableEquiv.piCongrLeft (fun _ ‚Ü¶ G) ŌÜ
      have perm_apply : ‚ąÄ (i : Fin m) (x : Fin m ‚Üí G), perm x i = x (ŌÜ.symm i) := by
            intro i x
            simp only [perm]
            rw [MeasurableEquiv.coe_piCongrLeft, Equiv.piCongrLeft_apply]
            simp only [eq_rec_constant]
      have invar : sum ‚ąė perm = sum := by
        ext x
        rw [comp_apply]
        convert Finset.sum_bijective ŌÜ.symm (Equiv.bijective ŌÜ.symm) ?_ ?_
        ¬∑ simp only [Finset.mem_univ, implies_true]
        intro i _
        rw [perm_apply i x]
      calc
        _ = Measure.map (sum ‚ąė perm) (Measure.pi fun i ‚Ü¶ Measure.map (X (ŌÜ i)) ‚Ąô) := by rw [invar]
        _ = Measure.map sum (Measure.map perm (Measure.pi fun i ‚Ü¶ Measure.map (X (ŌÜ i)) ‚Ąô)) := by
          rw [Measure.map_map]
          ¬∑ apply Finset.measurable_sum
            intro i _
            exact measurable_pi_apply i
          apply measurable_pi_lambda
          intro i
          have : (fun x : Fin m ‚Üí G ‚Ü¶ perm x i) = (fun x : Fin m ‚Üí G ‚Ü¶ x (ŌÜ.symm i)) := by
            ext x
            exact perm_apply i x
          rw [this]
          exact measurable_pi_apply ((Equiv.symm ŌÜ) i)
        _ = _ := by
          congr
          exact (MeasureTheory.measurePreserving_piCongrLeft (fun i ‚Ü¶ Measure.map (X i) ‚Ąô) ŌÜ).map_eq
  }

. set S : Finset (Fin 2 √ó Fin m) := Finset.map (Function.Embedding.sectR (0:Fin 2) (Fin m)) Finset.univ

have : ‚ąĎ t, (Measure.real ‚Ąô (T‚āÉ ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {t})) * d[ X‚āĀ # X‚āā ] ‚Č§ ‚ąĎ t, (Measure.real ‚Ąô (T‚āÉ ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {t})) *
    (d[T‚āĀ ; ‚Ąô[|T‚āÉ ‚Üź t] # T‚āā ; ‚Ąô[|T‚āÉ ‚Üź t]]
      + ő∑ * (ŌĀ[T‚āĀ ; ‚Ąô[|T‚āÉ ‚Üź t] # A] - ŌĀ[X‚āĀ # A]) + ő∑ * (ŌĀ[T‚āā ; ‚Ąô[|T‚āÉ ‚Üź t] # A] - ŌĀ[X‚āā # A])) := by

  rcases eq_or_ne (Measure.real ‚Ąô (T‚āÉ ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' {t})) 0 with h't | h't
  ¬∑ simp [h't]
  have : IsProbabilityMeasure (‚Ąô[|T‚āÉ ‚Üź t]) := cond_isProbabilityMeasure_of_real h't

    simp [‚Üź map_measureReal_apply hT‚āÉ (measurableSet_singleton _)]
  simp_rw [‚Üź Finset.sum_mul, S, mul_add, Finset.sum_add_distrib, ‚Üź mul_assoc, mul_comm _ ő∑,

  subst h2T‚āÉ

    using ent_bsg hT‚āĀ hT‚āā (őľ := ‚Ąô)

prior_tactics:
have log_sub_le : (log (Nat.card H) - H[X]) + (log (Nat.card H) - H[Y]) ‚Č§ 20 * d[X # Y] := calc
  (log (Nat.card H) - H[X]) + (log (Nat.card H) - H[Y]) =
    (H[U] - H[X]) + (H[U] - H[Y]) := by
      rw [IsUniform.entropy_eq' H_fin hUunif hUmeas, SetLike.coe_sort_coe]
  _ ‚Č§ |(H[U] - H[X])| + |(H[U] - H[Y])| := by gcongr <;> exact le_abs_self _
  _ ‚Č§ 2 * d[X # U] + 2 * d[Y # U] := by
    gcongr
    ¬∑ rw [rdist_symm]; exact diff_ent_le_rdist hUmeas hX
    ¬∑ rw [rdist_symm]; exact diff_ent_le_rdist hUmeas hY
  _ = 2 * (d[X # U] + d[Y # U]) := by ring
  _ ‚Č§ 2 * (10 * d[X # Y]) := by gcongr
  _ = 20 * d[X # Y] := by ring
